title: Vaessen Creative Transparent 0.4mm x 50m Spool Tear-Resistant Cord String Nylon Thread Fishing Line for Crafting, Sewing, Beading and Hanging Decorations
features: Nylon thread - The durable, waterproof polyamide thread can be used for sewing, embroidery, quilting, jewellery crafts, paper crafts and attaching decorations
Transparent – The thread can be combined with all colours and fabrics and is not noticeable on light backgrounds. Ideal for invisible hems, seams and stitches
Strong - The cord is not stretchy but still flexible. It has a pulling force up to approx. 8kg Ideal for hanging decorative items and creating hanging decorations
Easy to use - The nylon wire allows you to thread beads, tie knots and attach decorations by hand or with a sewing machine
DIMENSIONS - Length 50 m, Diameter 0.4 mm. The thread is wound on a spool. The thread end is attached to a slot in the spool
description: This invisible thread from Vaessen Creative is an indispensable accessory for quilting, sewing, embroidery, jewellery making and creating many other craft ideas. Ideal for enthusiasts. The strong nylon thread is a non-elastic but flexible craft item. When making jewellery yourself or making beads, even small beads can be easily and quickly threaded on the Perlon thread. In addition, with the polyamide thread hanging decorations such as Christmas wreaths, garlands, wind chimes, mobile or party decorations. The thread can withstand a load of about 8 kg. For hanging decorative items, sewing and other crafts, the cord is very easy to knot. If the knot needs to be particularly secure and firm, it is recommended to tie an angler knot. The transparent nylon cord is very difficult to see on light surfaces. It can be combined with any type and colour of fabric to create invisible hems, seams or embroidery. The thread is also ideal for invisible fastening of embellishments and small embellishments such as sequins, appliques, buttons or patches. The decorative craft materials can be sewn either by hand or with a sewing machine and give a professional finish to a craft project. For safe and tidy storage of the tear-resistant craft thread, the thread end can be attached to a slot in the spool. This package contains: 1 spool of transparent nylon thread by Vaessen Creative length: 50 m, diameter: 0.4 mm.
